name_cn:
Genuine Grade
【Bvlgari】Bvlgari Serpenti Forever Wrist Clutch, Counter Hot Style. Original Quality, Imported South African Leather + Custom Original Hardware. 🎉🎉 Adorned with Serpenti black and white enamel and light gold-plated snake head clasp, inlaid with emerald green turquoise eyes, with detachable shoulder strap 🎀. Three-compartment interior for a simple and practical design to meet your different needs. Includes raincoat, mirror, counter gift box packaging, laser anti-counterfeit tag and printed unique code. Model: 38329, Dimensions: 18*16*9cm
